Privacy Policy

Last updated: 26.12.2025

1. Overview

“Low Carb Low Fat” (the “Service”) is an experimental GPT-based tool that analyzes user-provided restaurant menu text and highlights menu items that may appear low in carbohydrates and/or fat based on simple heuristics.

The Service is provided for informational purposes only.

2. User-Provided Data

The Service processes only the text that users voluntarily copy and paste into it, such as restaurant menus or food descriptions.

Users should not submit personal data, sensitive information, or any content they do not have the legal right to share.

3. No Data Storage

The Service does not intentionally collect, store, retain, or archive user-submitted data. Inputs are processed transiently to generate a response and are not saved by the Service owner.

4. No Health or Nutritional Advice

The Service does not provide medical, nutritional, dietary, or health advice.

All outputs are generated using simplified keyword-based and heuristic analysis and may be inaccurate, incomplete, or outdated.

Users are solely responsible for their food choices, dietary decisions, and health outcomes.

5. Disclaimer of Responsibility

The Service does not verify restaurant menus, ingredients, preparation methods, portion sizes, or nutritional values.

No guarantees are made regarding the accuracy, correctness, or suitability of any output. The Service is provided “as is” and “as available”.

The Service owner assumes no liability for any direct or indirect consequences arising from the use of the Service.

6. Third-Party Processing

The Service is powered by third-party AI infrastructure. User inputs may be processed by such providers in accordance with their own privacy policies and terms.

The Service owner does not control, access, or manage third-party system logs and does not sell or monetize user data.

7. No Tracking

The Service does not use cookies, analytics, tracking technologies, or user profiling.

8. Data Subject Rights

As the Service does not intentionally store personal data, there is generally no data available for access, correction, or deletion requests.

If personal data is submitted unintentionally, users should discontinue use of the Service.

9. Changes to This Policy

This Privacy Policy may be updated at any time without prior notice. Continued use of the Service constitutes acceptance of the current version.

10. Contact

If you do not agree with this Privacy Policy, please do not use the Service.
